events.description: Soft, ambient instrumental music with a gentle melody, creating a calm and welcoming atmosphere.
Bright timbre, soft onset, rising-falling contour, full of surprise and delight; exact words: "Woa! It is so beautiful!"
events.object: Character 1 (young girl's voice) says, "Woa! It is so beautiful!"

events.description: Footsteps in the forest, light gravel crunch, moderate pace.
Upbeat, cheerful song with a catchy melody, lyrics about adventure and friendship.
Natural bird sounds, chirping in the morning, creating a serene and peaceful ambiance.
Soft, instrumental music with a slow tempo, evoking a sense of tranquility and reflection.
